deviation_note: Courts may deviate if combined income exceeds $30,000/month with significant income disparity, or for other documented reasons (Section IX) — this calculator shows the presumptive guideline amount only, not a court order. Note: at exactly equal (50/50) parenting time, Arizona's guidelines may still order the higher-earning parent to pay support based on income disparity alone — this calculator determines the paying parent from parenting-time majority and may not reflect that specific scenario; consult an attorney if your parenting time is exactly equal.
